untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental earnings data (Current quarter EPS YoY growth, quarter-over-quarter EPS acceleration) which are not available in the allowed technical indicator list. Allowed indicators are limited to price action, moving averages, oscillators, and volatility metrics. Earnings data requires a separate fundamental data feed not present in this backtest engine.
translation_notes: This signal is based on fundamental analysis (earnings momentum) rather than technical analysis. The CANSLIM methodology referenced in the source material relies on earnings data that must be sourced from financial statements, not derived from price/volume indicators. To implement this rule, the backtest engine would need to integrate quarterly earnings datasets and support comparisons of EPS metrics across periods.
